title: CONSTRUCTION CARELINE - 211info
text: LINES FOR LIFE CONSTRUCTION CARELINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a mental health oriented confidential warmline. 5100 SW Macadam Avenue Suite 400 Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Individuals who are employed in the construction industry Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 433-7878 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 433-7878 Toll-free (833) 444-6020 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Talklines/Warmlines * Construction Laborers Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - 988 SUICIDE AND CRISIS LIFELINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MILITARY HELPLINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - SENIOR LONELINESS LINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - YOUTHLINE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ALCOHOL AND DRUG HELPLINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LINES FOR LIFE
